strategy_summary: The phosphorylation atlas was curated by systematically extracting kinase-substrate-phosphosite relationships from PhosphoSitePlus, SIGNOR, ELM, and IntAct. Data was parsed from downloaded datasets, standardized using UniProt ID mapping, and cross-referenced to ensure exhaustiveness. Heptameric peptide sequences were extracted from UniProt where not directly available. Relationships were validated across databases, and all supporting sources were recorded.
